tools.name: compact
tools.description: Summarise the current session and fork into a fresh session seeded with the summary. Skips when token count is below threshold_tokens (default 10000). Phase 7.1b validating demo — exercises session:read, session:fork, and llm:invoke end-to-end.
tools.schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"threshold_tokens":{"type":"integer","description":"Skip compaction if session token count is below this; default 10000."}}}
